content.full_text:
January 8, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission

Dana Point is a new city in South Orange County. They have recently developed a very vigorous plan for a large 420-acre Redevelopment Area. They have several full-time employees working from the City Hall on this matter. I am a local property owner. I need help in defending my property from this committee. Do I have some legal assistance? It is needed.

Thank you,

Jim Webb
34202 Coast Highway
Dana Point, Ca 92629
